name: local-ai-stack-safety
title: Local AI Stack Safety
version_notes: Initial first-party lightweight safety-review skill version.

outputs.notes: Standalone skill README copied from first-party module source.
Standalone skill entrypoint copied from first-party module source.
OpenAI platform metadata copied from first-party module source.

skill_creation_review.existing_skill_review: Reviewed current skills before adding local-ai-stack-safety: n8n-agent-rules, n8n-local-setup, windows-localhost-workflows, secure-cicd-installer, ai-coding-agent-rules, and context-preserving-ai-publisher. No existing skill covers this exact non-n8n safety-review trigger without either being too narrow or too broad.
skill_creation_review.trigger: Use only when reviewing or planning local AI stack setup such as local LLM runners, model servers, Stable Diffusion or ComfyUI-style web UIs, vector databases, model downloads, GPU/runtime changes, or exposing local AI endpoints. Do not use for ordinary AI API coding, model prompting, or general application work.
skill_creation_review.decision_reason: Local AI Stack Safety has a distinct safety boundary and invocation trigger, so folding it into ai-coding-agent-rules would make the always-adjacent coding rules heavier while hiding the setup/exposure review boundary.
skill_creation_review.unique_value: Forces a short risk review before high-impact local setup or service exposure work that agents might otherwise treat as ordinary setup commands.
skill_creation_review.runtime_footprint: SKILL.md is intentionally short, review-only, and has no required long references or bundled tools; optional detail is not loaded by default.
skill_creation_review.local_assets: No local assets beyond README, SKILL.md, and small platform metadata because the useful behavior is a compact safety review, not an installer or tutorial.
skill_creation_review.output_contract: Return a compact Local AI Stack Safety Review with risk level, blocked actions, approval-gated actions, safer first-run plan, files/settings to inspect, and validation checks such as localhost-only health checks or port binding review.
skill_creation_review.anti_bloat_review: The skill is rejected for ordinary coding and model-general advice; it triggers only on setup/exposure/credential/live-system risk and produces a compact review instead of a tutorial.
skill_creation_review.safety_boundary: Review-only by default. Installation, model pulls, Docker, public tunnels, driver/runtime changes, shell profile edits, credentials, or non-local network exposure require explicit current-turn approval.
skill_creation_review.third_party_audit: not_applicable_first_party; no third-party text or code copied or adapted.
skill_creation_review.publisher_workflow: context-preserving-ai-publisher source-to-surface workflow with first-party _main source, deterministic copy outputs, routing updates, safety matrix updates, sync, and validation.
skill_creation_review.routing: local-ai-stack-safety is routed only for local-ai-stack-safety review/planning tasks involving local AI runtimes, model servers, model downloads, GPU/runtime setup, local AI web UIs, or endpoint exposure.

project.name: Local AI Stack Safety
